title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE CROSSING STA. CLARA â SANDAYONG ROAD TO THE BOUNDARY OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE CONNECTING THE MUNICIPALITY OF NAGA, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA SIBUGAY AND THE PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE INTO A NATIONAL ROAD

chunks.text:
H. No. 4712

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10019, February 23, 2010 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE CROSSING STA. CLARA â SANDAYONG ROAD TO THE BOUNDARY OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE CONNECTING THE MUNICIPALITY OF NAGA, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA SIBUGAY AND THE PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE INTO A NATIONAL ROAD

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The road which starts from Crossing Sta. Clara â Sandayong to the boundary of Zamboanga del Norte connecting the Municipality of Naga, Province of Zamboanga Sibugay and the Province of Zamboanga del Norte is hereby converted into a national road.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of the Department of Public Works and Highways shall issue the necessary rules, orders and circulars to implement the provision of this Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

(Sgd.) PROSPERO C. NOGRALES

President of Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on September 2, 2008 and November 10, 2009, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary of Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: FEB 23 2010

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
